title: drosera rotundifolia f. comosa
intro: Drosera rotundifolia f. comosa is a variant of the sundew plant, specifically a subspecies of Drosera rotundifolia that is characterized by its comosa flowers, which are more compact and dense compared to the typical rotundifolia flowers. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its ability to stimulate digestion and relieve respiratory issues. The health benefits of Drosera rotundifolia f. comosa are attributed to its anti-inflammatory and expectorant properties, which can help alleviate coughs, colds, and bronchitis. Drosera rotundifolia f. comosa can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, allowing for a range of applications in traditional medicine.
